title: Google and Samsung launch AI tools Siri still can’t match
description: Google has announced that its artificial intelligence (AI) model, Gemini, will soon be able to handle complex multi-step tasks on smartphones.

title: BMC Budget 2026: Mumbai Civic Body Bets Big On AI Surveillance To Transform City Monitoring, Allocates ₹46.67 Crore For Disaster Management
description: The Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation plans to deploy AI-based video analytics across 500 existing CCTV cameras and install 650 more to improve surveillance, civic enforcement, and disaster response. With ₹46.67 crore allocated for 2026–27, the move will help monitor dumping, encroachments, and waterlogging while boosting coordination with police and disaster agencies.

title: Where AI lives: Southeast Asia's data center boom
description: As demand for artificial intelligence heats up, technology giants are racing to invest billions of dollars in Southeast Asia, attracted by a growing plugged-in user base.

title: AIxC Hub Surpasses 4.8M Registered Wallets, Introduces New Season, and Announces "Agentir" for AI Agents
description: LOS ANGELES, Feb. 26, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- AIxCrypto Inc. (NASDAQ: AIXC, "AIxC" or the "Company"), a U.S.-Nasdaq listed company integrating AI and blockchain while bridging Web2 and Web3, today announced AIxC Hub's expanded ecosystem growth, newest season, and the planned launch of...

title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Series Debuts in India with Privacy Display and Smarter AI Features
description: Samsung’s Galaxy S26 lineup introduces a built-in privacy display, enhanced AI tools, refined design, and upgraded performance across all models.
